title: Criticism of political decision not violation of personality rights, file defamation case: Delhi High Court to Raghav Chadha
description: The Delhi High Court on Thursday said that criticism of Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) Member of Parliament (MP) Raghav Chadha's political decisions cannot be termed as violation of personality rights and Chadha can only sue for defamation when it comes to such criticism.Justice Subramonium Prasad said that the content flagged by Chadha prima facie did not reveal any violation of personality rights."See, the point is this, sir. The first impression in my mind. Prima facie, there is no personality
